definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">entity_attacked</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="entity_nbt_logic_get"><value name="entity"><block type="immediate_source_entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="tagName"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">crystallite_nether_diamond_upgrade</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="controls_if"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">Nerf - do NOT apply arrow effects if in water</comment><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_negate"><value name="BOOL"><block type="entity_isinwaterrain_orbubblecolumn"><value name="entity"><block type="immediate_source_entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="execute_command"><value name="command"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">summon armor_stand ~ ~ ~ {Invisible:1b,ForgeData:{crystallite_nether_diamond_upgrade:1b}}</field></block></value><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value></block></statement></block></statement></block></next></block><block type="entity_execute_command" x="196" y="298"><value name="command"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">clear</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block><block type="entity_despawn" x="123" y="398"><value name="entity"><block type="immediate_source_entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="explode"><field name="mode">TNT</field><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="power"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value></block></next></block></xml>
